description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical juice can with a vibrant red background and bold, colorful graphics wrapping around its surface. The can features a large, stylized blue and green logo with a pink lightning bolt, giving it a dynamic and energetic appearance. White horizontal stripes encircle the can, adding a sense of structure and contrast to the design. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab for opening. The word 'Cola' is visible in white script near the lower portion of the can, suggesting a cola-flavored juice. The overall look is eye-catching and modern, suitable for urban environments such as convenience stores, vending machines, or street-side kiosks.
description: A tall, red cylindrical juice can with bold, colorful graphics, a metallic pull tab, and the word 'Cola' on its side.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main logo in blue and green with a pink lightning bolt, set against a red background with white stripes.
description_view_1: This view highlights the large blue 'T' in the logo and reveals the word 'Cola' in white script near the bottom.
description_view_2: The back view displays only the red background with evenly spaced white horizontal stripes, with no visible branding or graphics.
description_view_3: This side view shows the edge of the main logo and lightning bolt, with most of the can covered in red and white stripes.
